creator: destination_wellknown
caption:
Copenhagen Airport Secrets 👀🇩🇰  When I’m standing in the Security line at Manchester or Berlin Airport (some of the worst airports in Europe), I always think back at how amazing it was to fly out of Copenhagen… 🤠   CPH Airport is, in my opinion, one of the best airports in Europe, and getting through Security is always pretty fast - and here’s a quick airport travel hack if you want to get through to your gate even faster. 

What is the worst airport you’ve ever flown from? 🫣

#cphairport #copenhagen #airportlife

transcription.text: Thanks for watching, and I'll see you in the next video!
